Note.title: Note
Note.description: Represents a user's note that is synchronized across their devices

title.description: The title of the note. Max 100 chars.

content.description: The markdown context or raw text of the note.

folder.description: The folder/category string (e.g. personal, work, ideas, trash).

tags.description: List of string tags for additional group filtering.

isPinned.description: Whether the note is pinned to the top of the list.

isFavorite.description: Whether the note is marked as a favorite.

color.description: Visual color category representation (e.g. slate, blue, amber, emerald, pink).

userId.description: The authenticated Firebase User ID of the owner.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the note was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the note was last modified.

notes/{noteId}.description: A collection storing individual user notes, where read and write rules are scoped strictly to the authenticating user (ownerId == auth.uid).
